ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption habits of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_records" (
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "time_of_death" INTEGER /* Time of death */,
  "death" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has died */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death */,
  "place_of_death" TEXT /* Place of death */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mortality record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mortality record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mortality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_demographics" (
  "demographics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the patient */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the patient */,
  "country_of_birth" TEXT /* Country of birth of the patient */,
  "country_of_residence" TEXT /* Country of residence of the patient */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the demographic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the demographic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_demographics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health condition */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the health condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "condition_status" TEXT /* Status of the condition */,
  "last_checked_date" TEXT /* Last date the condition was checked or updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the health condition record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the health condition record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_conditions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medication */,
  "prescribed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the provider who prescribed the medication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the medication record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the medication record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_prescribed_by FOREIGN KEY ("prescribed_by") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab test result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory test */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the laboratory test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the laboratory test */,
  "lab_reference_range" TEXT /* Reference range for the lab test */,
  "lab_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the lab test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lab test record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lab test record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the healthcare provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the healthcare provider */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the healthcare provider */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the healthcare provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the healthcare provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the provider record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the provider record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_provider" (
  "patient_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-provider relationship */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the patient-provider relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the patient-provider relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_provider_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_provider_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the research study */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the research study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "research_institution" TEXT /* Name of the research institution */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the study record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the study record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_studies" (
  "patient_study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-research study relationship */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research study */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the patient enrolled in the study */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date the patient withdrew from the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_studies_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_studies_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the health policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health policy */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the health policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the policy record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the policy record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy impact record */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health policy */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact of the health policy on the patient */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Type of impact */,
  "impact_date" TEXT /* Date the impact was observed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the impact record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the impact record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_impact_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES health_policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_impact_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data access record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access to the patient's data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access to the patient's data */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the patient data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, healthcare provider) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
